---
title: "Session 1: Welcome, Recap & Tooling Upgrade"
date: "2026-03-12"
date-modified: last-modified
---

::: {.callout-note}
**Date:** Thursday, 12 March 2026, 16:00–19:00
:::

## Learning goals

- Understand course structure, expectations, and assessment
- Refresh key R and Quarto skills from the prior course
- Set up a clean, reproducible project workflow (`.Rproj`, relative paths, folder structure)
- Upgrade Quarto skills: YAML front matter, multiple output formats, bibliography with BibTeX
- Understand the basics of Git version control via the RStudio Git pane

## Session flow

| Time | Activity |
|---|---|
| 16:00–16:20 | Welcome, course overview, assessment |
| 16:20–17:00 | Quarto upgrade walkthrough + live demo |
| 17:00–17:15 | Git orientation |
| 17:15–18:15 | Student exercise |
| 18:15–19:00 | Introduce Take-home Task 1, Q&A |

## Quarto skill introduced this session

Document structure, YAML front matter (`title`, `author`, `date`, `format`, `toc`, `number-sections`), bibliography with BibTeX (`.bib` files, `@citation` syntax).

## Take-home task 1

Assigned at the end of this session. See the task handout for full instructions.

- **Dataset:** World Bank Life Expectancy (182 countries, GDP per capita and life expectancy, 2017)
- **Due:** Thursday, 02 April 2026, 08:00
- **Submission:** Rendered Quarto HTML report

::: {.callout-important}
Material (slides, exercise sheet, task handout) will be available here before the session.
:::
